# 🎯 Terraform Healer Roadmap

This document tracks planned features and their current status. See [docs/FUTURE_ROADMAP.md](../docs/FUTURE_ROADMAP.md) for detailed descriptions.

## 🚀 In Progress

Nothing currently in development.

## 📋 Planned

### High Priority (Next 3-6 Months)
- [ ] 📊 Metrics Dashboard - Analytics and ROI tracking
- [ ] 🔄 Auto-Merge Implementation - K8s CronJob for automated merging
- [ ] 🔍 Pattern Learning - Build library of successful fixes
- [ ] 📧 Multi-Channel Notifications - Teams, Email, PagerDuty

### Medium Priority (6-12 Months)
- [ ] 🧪 Test Generation - Auto-create terraform test cases
- [ ] 🌐 Multi-Cloud Enhancements - Better AWS/Azure/GCP support
- [ ] 🔐 Advanced Security - Snyk, Checkov integration
- [ ] 📝 Documentation Updates - Auto-update READMEs
- [ ] 🎮 Interactive UI - Web interface for review/modification

### Lower Priority (12+ Months)
- [ ] 🤝 Multi-Tool Support - Terragrunt, OpenTofu, Pulumi
- [ ] 🧬 AI Fine-Tuning - Custom model per organization
- [ ] 🌊 Drift Detection - Auto-fix state drift
- [ ] 🔄 Auto-Rollback - Revert on post-merge errors
- [ ] 💰 Cost Optimization - Suggest cheaper alternatives

## ✅ Completed

- [x] Initial MVP with AI-powered fixes
- [x] 8-layer validation pipeline
- [x] Multi-org support
- [x] Rich GitHub issues and PRs
- [x] Slack integration with emojis
- [x] Comprehensive documentation
- [x] Open source preparation

## 🚫 Won't Do

- Running `terraform apply` automatically
- Modifying state files directly
- Bypassing human review for HIGH/CRITICAL risks

## 💡 Suggest a Feature

Have an idea? [Open a feature request](https://github.com/YOUR_USERNAME/terraform-healer/issues/new?template=feature_request.md)!
